deadline: 8:00 am on April 22 to 4:00 pm on June 22, 2026
geographic_restrictions: Primarily Pennsylvania, with some multi-county or statewide grants
project_area: Watershed restoration and protection, stormwater management, surface mining reclamation, and environmental sustainability projects
demographic_requirements: No specific demographic requirements mentioned; projects must align with environmental restoration and protection goals.
eligibility_summary: Open to local governments, conservation districts, non-profits, municipalities, counties, educational institutions, conservancies, and watershed associations in Pennsylvania. Projects must focus on watershed restoration, stormwater management, surface mining reclamation, or environmental sustainability.
